items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #3' is blocked because the LLM evaluation call failed, preventing any conclusive scoring of the scenario. Without a successful evaluation, it is impossible to determine if the expected outcome of the scenario behavior being confirmed or producing a clear failure report has been met. This lack of evaluative evidence leads to an inconclusive status.
